inputs.label: Monthly After-Tax Income
inputs.businessContext: Total monthly income after deductions and taxes.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total monthly income after deductions and taxes.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kesintiler ve vergiler sonrası toplam aylık gelir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtes monatliches Einkommen nach Abzügen und Steuern.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Revenu mensuel total après déductions et impôts.
businessContext_i18n.es: Ingreso mensual total después de deducciones e impuestos.
businessContext_i18n.ar: إجمالي الدخل الشهري بعد الخصومات والضرائب.

inputs.label: Needs Percentage
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of income for essential needs (housing, food, utilities).

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of income for essential needs (housing, food, utilities).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Temel ihtiyaçlar için gelir yüzdesi (barınma, gıda, faturalar).
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz des Einkommens für Grundbedürfnisse (Wohnen, Essen, Nebenkosten).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage du revenu pour les besoins essentiels (logement, nourriture, services publics).
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje de ingresos para necesidades esenciales (vivienda, alimentación, servicios públicos).
businessContext_i18n.ar: النسبة المئوية من الدخل للاحتياجات الأساسية (السكن، الطعام، المرافق).

inputs.label: Wants Percentage
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of income for non-essential wants (entertainment, dining out).

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of income for non-essential wants (entertainment, dining out).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Zorunlu olmayan istekler için gelir yüzdesi (eğlence, dışarıda yemek).
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz des Einkommens für nicht notwendige Wünsche (Unterhaltung, Essen gehen).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage du revenu pour les envies non essentielles (divertissements, repas au restaurant).
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje de ingresos para deseos no esenciales (entretenimiento, salir a cenar).
businessContext_i18n.ar: النسبة المئوية من الدخل للرغبات غير الأساسية (الترفيه، تناول الطعام بالخارج).

inputs.label: Savings & Debt Percentage
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of income for savings, investments, or debt repayment.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of income for savings, investments, or debt repayment.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tasarruf, yatırım veya borç geri ödemesi için gelir yüzdesi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz des Einkommens für Sparen, Investitionen oder Schuldentilgung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage du revenu pour l'épargne, les investissements ou le remboursement de dettes.
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje de ingresos para ahorros, inversiones o pago de deudas.
businessContext_i18n.ar: النسبة المئوية من الدخل للادخار أو الاستثمارات أو سداد الديون.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
